ranking.title: ចំណោមអ្នកញ៉ែអូន
ranking.aiInsight: This track marks a strong debut or re-entry, quickly gaining high heat. Its festive Kuntrem style and scenic music video are resonating with audiences, positioning it as a potential hit for the upcoming Khmer New Year.
ranking.shortInsight: Explosive debut, captivating visuals, perfect for Khmer New Year.

ranking.artist: អ៊ុក សុវណ្ណារី & ធឿន បុរី (Ouk Sovannary & Thoeun Borey)
ranking.title: រើសប្តី៣លក្ខខណ្ឌ
ranking.aiInsight: A powerful debut or re-entry, this song quickly achieved high heat. The collaboration between Ouk Sovannary and Thoeun Borey, combined with its festive Romvong rhythm, makes it a popular choice for the upcoming New Year celebrations.
ranking.shortInsight: Festive Romvong hit, strong duo, perfect for New Year.

ranking.artist: ខេមរៈ សិរីមន្ត (Khemarak Sereymun)
ranking.title: ប្តីខ្មែរ
ranking.aiInsight: Maintaining a stable position with moderate growth, this song continues to generate high heat. Fans are particularly enthusiastic about Khemarak Sereymun's return to his classic Kuntrem style, anticipating it as a major hit for the New Year festivities.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable hit, classic Kuntrem style, anticipated New Year anthem.

ranking.title: 72 ម៉ោង
ranking.aiInsight: Despite very minimal growth, this song holds strong heat and has generated significant discussion. Listeners are deeply engaged with its emotional narrative, which portrays a woman's sacrifice and heartbreak, sparking debate and detailed analysis among fans.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable, thought-provoking narrative, sparking fan discussion.

ranking.title: ១នាទី [ One Minute ]
ranking.aiInsight: McSey maintains a strong presence in the top ranks with 'One Minute,' demonstrating remarkable stability. The comments highlight the song's meaningful lyrics and motivational message, resonating deeply with listeners and solidifying McSey's reputation for impactful storytelling.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable top performer, praised for meaningful lyrics and impact.

ranking.title: លក្ខិណា
ranking.aiInsight: This track shows stable performance with minimal growth, yet maintains strong heat. Listeners appreciate Tep Piseth's vocal versatility, seamlessly blending singing and rapping, and many connect personally with the song's romantic narrative.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable performance, versatile artist, strong fan connection.

ranking.title: DECADE OF LOVE
ranking.aiInsight: Exhibiting stable performance with minimal growth, this collaboration maintains strong heat. Released for Valentine's Day, the song is praised for its smooth sound and the powerful synergy between Norith and Vannda, drawing international acclaim.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable Valentine's hit, legendary collaboration, smooth sound.

ranking.title: MOONLIGHT
ranking.aiInsight: GMENGZ and JADY's collaboration 'MOONLIGHT' holds a strong position, showing consistent performance. Fans are highly engaged, praising the track's quality and anticipating its virality on platforms like TikTok and Spotify, solidifying its status as a potential summer anthem.
ranking.shortInsight: High-ranking collaboration, praised for quality, anticipated viral hit.

ranking.title: New Year Again - ( ចូលឆ្នាំទៀតហើយ )
ranking.aiInsight: VANNO's 'New Year Again' makes a powerful debut, quickly gaining significant heat. The comments indicate strong fan engagement and excitement for the new year-themed song, suggesting it's poised to be a seasonal hit, celebrated for its festive energy.
ranking.shortInsight: Powerful debut, high fan engagement for festive new year anthem.

ranking.title: អាស្ទាវ | Youngster
ranking.aiInsight: KingChi's 'Youngster' featuring Long Bunn shows impressive growth, climbing the ranks with its impactful message. The song's critical commentary on youth culture, particularly those who rely on their parents, resonates strongly with listeners, sparking discussion and praise for its meaningful lyrics.
ranking.shortInsight: Significant growth, praised for impactful social commentary on youth.

ranking.title: ក្រមុំដុះស្នឹម
ranking.aiInsight: ក្រមុំដុះស្នឹម' by Thann Noerthorng makes a strong debut, resonating with listeners for its traditional Khmer New Year theme and cultural presentation. Comments praise the choreography and the song's overall festive appeal, positioning it as a popular choice for the holiday season.
ranking.shortInsight: Strong debut, celebrated for cultural Khmer New Year theme.

ranking.title: KHMER SIDE
ranking.aiInsight: McSey's 'KHMER SIDE' featuring Stonzz, DX-Mo, and 2Mdie maintains a solid position, showcasing the strength of collaborative Khmer Hip Hop. Fans laud the track's hot beats and the collective talent, with many anticipating its popularity during the New Year celebrations, blending traditional and modern sounds.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable collaborative hip hop, praised for beats and New Year appeal.

ranking.title: បើមានគេល្អជាងបង / If Only
ranking.aiInsight: This song maintains a stable position, resonating deeply with listeners due to its poignant lyrics about love, sacrifice, and societal pressures. The comments reflect strong emotional connection and relatability.
ranking.shortInsight: Deeply emotional song, stable performance, strong listener connection.

ranking.artist: Pich Solikah (ពេជ្រ សូលីកា)
ranking.title: ជនទី៣ (THE IN-BETWEEN)
ranking.aiInsight: This emotional ballad maintains a strong presence, holding a high heat score with steady growth. Its deeply relatable theme of being 'the third person' resonates profoundly with listeners, solidifying its position as a fan favorite.
ranking.shortInsight: Emotional ballad maintains strong chart presence with relatable themes.

ranking.title: SNEHA (Remix)
ranking.aiInsight: This remix maintains a strong presence, holding a high heat score despite modest growth. Fans express deep affection for the song, highlighting its 'sweet taste' and the successful collaboration.
ranking.shortInsight: Strong fan favorite, maintaining high heat with successful remix.

ranking.title: NEW CUT
ranking.aiInsight: Despite showing the lowest growth and heat in this snapshot, VannDa's track maintains a stable presence, drawing significant international praise and appreciation for his unique style and elevating Cambodian rap music.
ranking.shortInsight: Stable presence, strong international fan base, unique style.

ranking.artist: លំ សុក្រិត / Lom Sokrith
ranking.title: វង្វេងស្នេហ៍ / Woveng Sneh
ranking.aiInsight: This song debuts with strong momentum, topping the heat chart. However, comments reveal significant controversy regarding alleged melody and title plagiarism, leading to mixed reception despite its high initial engagement.
ranking.shortInsight: Debuts strongly, but faces controversy over alleged melody plagiarism.

ranking.title: PISEY
ranking.aiInsight: Monetrey Ek's "PISEY" shows strong upward momentum, climbing from rank 20 with significant growth and high heat. The song is praised for its fresh, tropical, and unique "Latino" inspired sound, marking a new vibe in Khmer music.
ranking.shortInsight: Fresh tropical vibes propel this unique track with strong growth.

ranking.artist: ធែល​ ថៃ (Thel Thai), ប៉ាច​ គីមមួយ (Pach Kim Mouy), សយ​ ​រតនៈ (Soy Rotanak)
ranking.title: ស្វាគមន៍​តារាចម្រៀង​ទាំងបីដួង (Welcome Three Singers)
ranking.aiInsight: This promotional video marks a significant event, announcing the signing of three popular singers to Sunday Production. The high heat and strong growth reflect immense fan excitement and anticipation for new music from these artists under their new label.
ranking.shortInsight: New artist announcement generates high fan excitement and anticipation.

ranking.title: 2026 "Uh Oh"
ranking.aiInsight: Khmer1Jivit makes an explosive return with "2026 'Uh Oh'", debuting or re-entering the charts with exceptionally high growth and strong heat. Fans express immense loyalty and excitement for the "legendary" artist's comeback, hailing him as a top Khmer rap lyricist.
ranking.shortInsight: Legendary rapper's explosive comeback ignites charts with loyal fan support.
